title: Zichuan 2
synopsis: To clear suspicion, words are the weakest defense. True power speaks for itself! General Zichuan Xiu, who once single-handedly executed a traitor of the Zichuan clan within the Demon Clan's stronghold, has risen to command hundreds of thousands of allied troops in the Far East. Supported by the Guardian Elders of the Sacred Temple, this warrior now ascends as the new sovereign of the Eastern lands: The Bright King is crowned! (Source: WeTV)

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Tian Xiang
synonyms: ลิขิตสวรรค์
synopsis: 15 years ago, an eerie catastrophe struck Luofeng City, reducing it to a lifeless ruin overnight. Ding Xiao—once hailed as a prodigy for forming his spirit embryo at the age of seven—joined the Spirit Suppression Sect, only to fall from grace after shattering his own embryo. Cast out, he was forced to serve as a coffin bearer in the Guibu Division, enduring five long years of hardship and scorn. Against all odds, he awakened his power anew, stunning everyone during the Sect's advancement trials and rising as a force to be reckoned with—a growing threat to the Lingbu Division. Nowadays, as sinister omens spread and supernatural threats loomed, Ding Xiao embarked on a perilous quest to save his ailing sister. But the path ahead drew him into a web of power struggles and hidden truths. As the tragedy of Luofeng City gradually came to light, he discovered that his fate was bound inseparably to the destiny of the spirits themselves.....

synopsis: Takeru Aoyama, a young man, continues his journey in search of the Three Sacred Treasures in order to save humanity, bravely contending against the Chimimouryou (evil spirits of the mountains and rivers in the mythical Japanese bestiary).

title: Shan Hai Ji Hui
synopsis: In the future, with the increasing occurrence of natural disasters and catastrophes from the universe, a mysterious organization called “Sha Hai Organization” seeks to destroy and replace the human race, posing a deadly threat to the Earth. The leading character Lei Si joins the Crisis Case Unit and sets up an exoskeleton armored squad called “Tai Ji Ding” for multi-directional confrontations against this mysterious technology organization. Through decryptions step by step, Lei Si and his team find that human dream is a window to the world that is invisible to naked eyes in the universe, thus starting a sci-fi exploration between reality and quadrant and a fight between civilizations of different ages.

title: Transformers: Wild King
titleNative: トランスフォーマー ワイルドキング
synopsis: The story takes place on the planet Elementros, which has unknown powers. The main character, Optimus Prime, follows his friend Megatron and lands on this planet. There, Optimus meets Lightlong, a giraffe-type Transformer who is an energy beast. According to Lightlong, the energy beasts that live on Elementros in the form of animals and dinosaurs have five elements of "element energy" hidden within them: fire, water, earth, nature, and lightning. Suddenly, Megatron attacks. Optimus and Lightlong use the power of their bond to awaken the ability to transform and combine [Wild King]. Optimus joins forces with the animals, and Megatron commands the dinosaurs. What will be its fate?! (Source: Youtube)

title: Xevious
synopsis: In the year 2150 A.D. space pilot Takeru and human computer Martha come across a giant ship which contains two mechanical beings called Sara and Ru Mi. They warn Takeru and Martha of the Gump, an alien race that is heading to Earth so that it can take over the planet. With only 40 mintues remaining until Earth's invasion, Takeru enters the Solvalou, a combat aircraft, and heads to the Gump's base on the planet Andoa. Based on Namco's classic 1980s videogame of the same name. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: DON'T CRY
synopsis: In this era, AI has come to power. Birthing limits were implemented in order to manage the AI population that has grown too much. Although AI’s threatening, illegal birth laws are no end of mankind’s desire. The parents and children would be killed if exposed by government. The couple are heading the port toward the resistance force called the ‘Human Tribe’ to save the children. AI was approaching behind them. (Source: Tomovies Official Site) The short was initially screened in Italy at the Euganea Film Festival. It was taken to many other festivals and has won multiple awards throughout it's run in many film festivals.

title: A World Worth Protecting
synopsis: By the year 3029 CE, Earth's technology has developed rapidly, borders no longer exist, and Earth has been unified, marking the beginning of the era of the Federation. At that time, a huge sword flew from the heavens, piercing the sun and causing a huge sensation on Earth. Perhaps because the scabbard of the sword was already in tatters, countless shards have broken off from it following the collision with the sun and spread across the universe. Many of these shards have landed on various places across Earth. With the arrival of the bronze sword and its shards, a new unlimited energy source has suddenly appeared on Earth. This energy source has since been named Spirit Qi. Spirit Qi is like air, thick in some places and thin in others. As the Federation and other factions gather more shards, they discover more information on cultivation, pill refinement, Spirit Stone refinement, and other techniques.
